title: ACEF Copyright Rights Reservation Payload
description: Payload schema for copyright_rights_reservation records. Captures evidence of TDM opt-out compliance, rights reservation signal detection, and removal/exclusion processes per GPAI Art. 53, EU DSM Directive Art. 4(3), US Copyright Office guidance, and UK anticipated requirements.

opt_out_detection_method.description: Method used to detect opt-out signals (e.g., 'robots_txt_and_tdmrep', 'http_headers', 'manual_review').

tdmrep_protocol_version.description: Version of the W3C TDM Reservation Protocol used for detection.

removal_process.description: Process for removing or excluding content from rights-reserved sources (e.g., 'automated_pipeline_with_manual_review').

compliance_verification_date.description: Date the opt-out compliance was verified (ISO 8601).

reserved_works_removed.description: Number of reserved works that were removed or excluded from the dataset.

opt_out_signals_detected.description: Total number of opt-out signals detected during the compliance check.

detection_methods.description: All detection methods used in the compliance check.

signals_found.description: Number of opt-out signals found via this method.

crawler_identifiers.description: Crawler identifiers used for web scraping (for GPAI transparency requirements).

crawl_timing_windows.description: Time windows during which web crawling occurred.

top_domains_crawled.description: Top domains crawled (for GPAI transparency, typically top 10%).

complaint_mechanism.description: Complaint handling mechanism for rights holders.

response_sla.description: Service level agreement for responding to complaints.

memorization_mitigation.description: Methods for detecting and mitigating memorization/regurgitation risks.

legal_defensibility_record.description: Record supporting legal defensibility (US Copyright Office context).
